## nsc base-image build-github-image

Test the build of a base image.

```
nsc base-image build-github-image [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -f, --file string        Specifies what Dockerfile to build.
  -h, --help               help for build-github-image
  -l, --os-label string    Specifies the OS version of the base image. (default "ubuntu-22.04")
  -p, --platform strings   Which platforms to build for (linux/amd64 or linux/arm64) (default [linux/amd64,linux/arm64])
```
